mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.member_id, m.nickname AS member_nickname, c.title, c.organizer, c.category, c.description, c.cover_image, c.entry_start, c.entry_end, c.result_date, c.prize_info, c.price, c.status, c.entry_count, c.view_count, c.winner_notified_at, CASE WHEN #{memberId} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_bookmark WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND target_type = 'CONTEST' AND target_id = c.id) ELSE false END AS is_bookmarked, c.created_datetime FROM tbl_contest c LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON c.member_id = m.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted_datetime IS NULL AND c.status != 'DELETED'

SELECT ce.id, ce.contest_id, ce.work_id, w.title AS work_title, (SELECT wf.file_url FROM tbl_work_file wf WHERE wf.work_id = w.id ORDER BY wf.sort_order LIMIT 1) AS work_thumbnail, ce.member_id, m.nickname AS member_nickname, ce.award_rank, ce.submitted_at FROM tbl_contest_entry ce LEFT JOIN tbl_work w ON ce.work_id = w.id LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON ce.member_id = m.id WHERE ce.contest_id = #{contestId} ORDER BY ce.submitted_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_contest ( member_id, title, organizer, category, description, cover_image, entry_start, entry_end, result_date, prize_info, price, status ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{contest.title}, #{contest.organizer}, #{contest.category}, #{contest.description}, #{contest.coverImage}, #{contest.entryStart}, #{contest.entryEnd}, #{contest.resultDate}, #{contest.prizeInfo}, #{contest.price}, 'UPCOMING' )
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.title, c.organizer, c.category, c.cover_image, c.entry_end, c.status, c.entry_count, c.created_datetime, CASE WHEN c.entry_end < CURRENT_DATE THEN '마감' WHEN c.entry_end = CURRENT_DATE THEN 'D-Day' ELSE 'D-' || (c.entry_end - CURRENT_DATE) END AS d_day FROM tbl_contest c WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} AND c.deleted_datetime IS NULL AND c.status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY c.created_datetime DESC

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.organizer, c.category, c.cover_image, c.entry_end, c.status, c.entry_count, c.created_datetime, CASE WHEN c.entry_end < CURRENT_DATE THEN '마감' WHEN c.entry_end = CURRENT_DATE THEN 'D-Day' ELSE 'D-' || (c.entry_end - CURRENT_DATE) END AS d_day FROM tbl_contest_entry ce JOIN tbl_contest c ON ce.contest_id = c.id WHERE ce.member_id = #{memberId} AND c.deleted_datetime IS NULL AND c.status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY ce.submitted_at DESC
SELECT member_id FROM tbl_contest WHERE id = #{contestId} AND deleted_datetime IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tbl_contest WHERE id = #{contestId} AND deleted_datetime IS NULL AND status != 'DELETED' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_contest_entry ( contest_id, work_id, member_id, submitted_at ) VALUES ( #{entry.contestId}, #{entry.workId}, #{memberId}, now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_contest SET entry_count = entry_count + 1, updated_datetime = now() WHERE id = #{contestId}
UPDATE tbl_contest_entry SET award_rank = null WHERE contest_id = #{contestId} AND award_rank IS NOT NULL
mapper.select: SELECT w.id, w.title, ( SELECT wf.file_url FROM tbl_work_file wf WHERE wf.work_id = w.id ORDER BY wf.sort_order ASC, wf.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS thumbnail_url FROM tbl_work w WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} AND w.deleted_datetime IS NULL AND w.status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY w.created_datetime DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_contest SET title = #{contest.title}, organizer = #{contest.organizer}, category = #{contest.category}, description = #{contest.description}, cover_image = #{contest.coverImage}, entry_start = #{contest.entryStart}, entry_end = #{contest.entryEnd}, result_date = #{contest.resultDate}, prize_info = #{contest.prizeInfo}, price = #{contest.price}, status = COALESCE(#{contest.status}, status), updated_datetime = now() WHERE id = #{contestId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND deleted_datetime IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.tag_name FROM tbl_contest_tag ct JOIN tbl_tag t ON ct.tag_id = t.id WHERE ct.contest_id = #{contestId} ORDER BY t.tag_name ASC
INSERT INTO tbl_tag (tag_name) VALUES (#{tagName}) ON CONFLICT (tag_name) DO UPDATE SET tag_name = EXCLUDED.tag_name RETURNING id

SELECT c.id AS contest_id, c.member_id AS contest_owner_id, ce.member_id AS winner_member_id, ce.work_id AS winner_work_id FROM tbl_contest c JOIN tbl_contest_entry ce ON ce.contest_id = c.id AND ce.award_rank = '우승' WHERE c.deleted_datetime IS NULL AND c.winner_notified_at IS NULL AND c.result_date IS NOT NULL AND c.result_date <= to_timestamp(#{todayEpochDay} * 86400)::date
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_contest SET winner_notified_at = now(), updated_datetime = now() WHERE id = #{contestId}
